full_text_rationale: Full text describes PatchAdvisor using layered retrieval-based memory from historical Linux kernel patch evolution to guide later repair/review generation, with temporally held-out evaluation.
extractor_notes: Fresh search architecture extraction batch 008; controlled-comparison and quality status remain pending aggregate recomputation.
autores: Luyao Bai, Kenan Alghythee, Hang Zhang, Xiaoguang Wang
titulo: Beyond Crash-to-Patch: Patch Evolution for Linux Kernel Repair
formato_armazenamento: Three-layer PatchAdvisor memory from syzbot-linked patch evolution: instance memory with crash evidence, fix characterization, final merged diff, and patch-evolution summary; pattern memory with FixStrategy and ReviewLesson records; embedding memory over crash reports and patch artifacts for semantic retrieval.
framework_agente: PatchAdvisor repair framework with retrieval memory and fine-tuned diagnostic advisor
llm_utilizado: Claude coding model, Gemma-3-12B advisor, LLaMA-3.2-11B advisor
benchmarks_utilizados: 6,946 syzbot-linked Linux kernel bug-fix lifecycles, 100 temporally held-out crash cases for diagnostic evaluation, and six recent syzbot bugs for end-to-end repair
metricas_desempenho: Diagnostic Coverage Rate, precision, recall, F1, fix rate, CodeBERTScore, compilation success rate, average AI-assessed quality rank
baseline_comparado: Unguided baseline coding agent, memory-guided agent, base advisors without fine-tuning, fine-tuned PatchAdvisor variants
tamanho_memoria_ao_longo_tempo: Memory is constructed from 6,946 reconstructed syzbot-fixed bugs and can grow as additional patch-evolution lifecycles are collected; end-to-end test excludes held-out recent bugs from memory/training.
custo_por_tarefa: NR; advisor fine-tuning used LoRA on one NVIDIA A100 80GB GPU, but no monetary/token cost per task is reported.
resultado_principal: PatchAdvisor improves reviewer-alignment and repair quality. Memory raises diagnostic F1 by 21.8% (0.330 vs 0.271), and end-to-end memory guidance raises repair success from 1/6 to 4/6; the fine-tuned Gemma-3-12B advisor reaches 5/6 fixes, CodeBERTScore 0.91, and 100% compilation success.
desempenho_vs_baseline: Baseline repair succeeds on 1/6 bugs with CodeBERTScore 0.42 and 83.3% compile success. Memory-guided repair succeeds on 4/6 with CodeBERTScore 0.74. Fine-tuned Gemma-3-12B PatchAdvisor succeeds on 5/6 with average rank 2.7.
limitacoes: End-to-end repair evaluation uses only six recent bugs after strict selection; dataset is scoped to syzbot/Linux kernel workflows; advisor gives diagnostic summaries rather than complete patches.
ameacas_validade: Temporal holdout, syzbot workflow focus, keyword-mapped reviewer categories, small end-to-end bug sample, AI-assessed patch ranking, and compiler/toolchain differences may affect validity.
